title: Vault Writers Rules (Pillar 7)
description: Operational-config-only schema for governance/vault-writers-rules.json (pillar 7). SLIMMED to operational config per Plan 81 SP13 Session 5 A41 (SHAPE moved to file-type-contracts pillar 6) + extended per Session 6 A47 (historical_data_warning_default field). Authored by SP14 Batch A T-14.3 (2026-05-18).

processing_defaults.description: Universal defaults for writer-reconciler skill. Folder-level _processing-rules.json overrides; file-type-contracts pillar overrides above universal; precedence: folder > file-type > universal.

dedup.description: Default dedup strategy. content-hash matches Session 4 L-44 lock value (sha256 is the canonical content-hash strategy).

survivorship.description: Default survivorship. Two-signal operator-edit detection per Session 4 L-45 (last_user_edit timestamp + content-diff against writer's last-known-hash).

merge.description: Default merge strategy for tabular data.

staging_area.description: Out-of-vault staging path per Session 4 L-42. Writers emit packets via lib/staging-emit.sh; reconciler reads from this path; writes canonical output to vault destinations via standard write path.

reconciler_skill.description: Skill identity for the runtime reconciler. Renamed from inbox-processor per Session 4 L-51.

reconciler_tick_minutes_default.description: Default cron tick for async batch reconciliation per Session 4 L-43.

unreconciled_archive_days_default.description: After N days unreconciled, move packets to ~/.claude/state/vault-staging/_archive/ + librarian governance-parity-audit finding (Session 4 L-55).

foundation_variable_namespace.description: Generic foundation-shipped Mustache variables for destinations[].path substitution per Session 5 L-69. Cluster variables ({{engagement}}, {{project}}, etc.) are ADOPTER-DEFINED via overlay-master path_routing patterns — NEVER appear in foundation-shipped templates.

historical_data_warning_default.description: Universal default regex for hook branch #2 historical-data-warning per Session 6 A47. Per-type overrides via file-type-contracts/<type>.md.json :: historical_data_warning_pattern (Session 6 L-75).
